title: T-006 — calibration_instruments + calibration_records + sanitation_checklists + maintenance_history DDL + RLS (13-e, MNT §9.12-9.15)
prompt:
# T-006 — Calibration + sanitation + history (7y retention)

PRD: docs/prd/13-MAINTENANCE-PRD.md §9.12, §9.13, §9.14, §9.15, §5 (BRCGS+FSMA), §14.1 (7y retention)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create the 4 compliance-critical tables: `calibration_instruments`, `calibration_records`, `sanitation_checklists`, `maintenance_history`. All carry GENERATED `retention_until DATE STORED` columns enforcing 7y retention per BRCGS Issue 10 + FSMA 204 + §14.1.

## Pre-flight
Verify latest migration #; `equipment`/`mwo` (T-002/T-004) exist; `auth.users`/`app.current_org_id()` present; 09-quality `lab_results.equipment_id` FK target — D-MNT-10 documents it as forward-compat from 09-quality v3.1; this task only adds the comment, not the cross-module FK.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/NNNN_maintenance_e_calibration_sanitation.sql` with 4 tables per PRD §9.12-9.15 verbatim DDL.
2. `calibration_instruments.instrument_type CHECK IN ('scale','thermometer','ph_meter','other')`.
3. `calibration_instruments.standard CHECK IN ('ISO_9001','NIST','internal','other')`.
4. `calibration_records.result CHECK IN ('PASS','FAIL','OUT_OF_SPEC')`.
5. `calibration_records.retention_until DATE GENERATED ALWAYS AS (next_due_date + INTERVAL '7 years') STORED`.
6. `sanitation_checklists.retention_until DATE GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((completed_at::date + INTERVAL '7 years')) STORED`.
7. `maintenance_history.retention_until DATE GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((event_date::date + INTERVAL '7 years')) STORED`.
8. R13 audit cols + ENABLE+FORCE RLS via app.current_org_id() + site_user_access.
9. Indexes: `idx_cal_instr_org_site`, `idx_cal_rec_instrument_date`, `idx_cal_rec_next_due`, `idx_hist_equipment_date`.
10. Forward-compat SQL comment on `calibration_instruments`: `-- 09-QA v3.1 FK target: lab_results.equipment_id = calibration_instruments.id (D-MNT-10 documented, not enforced)`.
11. Drizzle schema in `packages/db/src/schema/maintenance/calibration.ts` + `packages/db/src/schema/maintenance/sanitation.ts` + `packages/db/src/schema/maintenance/history.ts`.
12. Vitest: GENERATED retention_until is non-NULL and equals input+7y; CHECK constraints enforced; RLS isolation; cannot UPDATE retention_until directly (it is GENERATED).

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/NNNN_maintenance_e_calibration_sanitation.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/maintenance/calibration.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/maintenance/sanitation.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/maintenance/history.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/maintenance-e-calibration-sanitation.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given migration runs, when the 4 tables are inspected, then CHECK constraints (instrument_type/standard/result), GENERATED retention_until, R13 audit cols, RLS+FORCE RLS are present.
2. Given INSERT into calibration_records with next_due_date='2026-06-01', when retention_until is queried, then it equals '2033-06-01' (7y).
3. Given UPDATE calibration_records SET retention_until=…, when executed, then it fails (column is GENERATED ALWAYS).
4. Given two orgs via app.set_org_context, when SELECT runs in each session, then RLS isolation holds and policies reference `app.current_org_id()`.

## Test strategy
- RED: maintenance-e-calibration-sanitation.test.ts asserting four ACs.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test maintenance-e-calibration-sanitation`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not store retention_until as plain DATE writable column — it MUST be GENERATED ALWAYS AS … STORED (BRCGS compliance audit).
- Do not add a cross-module FK to 09-quality `lab_results` here — comment only (D-MNT-10 documents forward-compat).
- Do not name business column tenant_id.
- Do not read current_setting() GUC.
- Do not skip ENABLE+FORCE RLS — these tables hold PII (technician signers).

pipeline_inputs.description: Create calibration_instruments + calibration_records + sanitation_checklists + maintenance_history with GENERATED retention_until (7y BRCGS), CHECKs, RLS.
pipeline_inputs.details: BRCGS Issue 10 + FSMA 204 require GENERATED retention. 09-quality FK target documented per D-MNT-10 forward-compat (comment only, no FK in this migration). Cross-module deps: 09-quality lab_results.equipment_id FK is added later by 09-quality T-NNN (out of scope here). Calibration certificate sign-off uses @monopilot/e-sign foundation primitive (T-124) — signEvent with replay nonce + paired audit (retention='security') per §14.3.
out_of_scope: Calibration cert SHA-256 e-sign (T-016 uses foundation T-124 e-sign primitive)
Sanitation cron / allergen-aware enforcement (T-012 outbox + 08-production gate)
